star_1.text: Love this game. Really fun to play at times when you're bored. Although repettive, it's not bad. There's ads but I honestly dont care, I can block them. The annoying part was while i was playing, there was a game-breaking ad that forced me to quit the game. Every. Single. Time. I didn't think of it that much, untill it happend way often. (Mainly because it has a stupid amount of ads, everytime you die.) After I got a million score, I died and tried to watch an ad, and the game-breaking ad came.

To be totally honest, ive been playing this game for an extremely long time, it's addictive and i love it. I was doing great in the game, i got almost my entire family to download and start playing the game on a daily basis as well. However, a couple of days ago, i lost everything... all of my progress, all 27 characters, outfits and hoverboards , 513 task collected hoverboards , 93 keys, etc. When i say, i lost everything, i mean everything. It sucks and the developer/support is no help!! :/

The GAME PLAY itself is fun. But like MANY others, i lost EVERYTHING i worked for even with "auto save" on. I left for a year, came back and started rebuilding and just lost it all again after a month of every day play. The game is useless if you actually can't save your progress. unfortunately it's time to delete and move on...to bad because it was my favorite game, and at one point i had EVERY character and board. Won't be wasting my time like that again on this game.

So I was attempting to get into the ranked rewards, and of course I was using hoverboards and score multipliers. I died by sheer coincidence and watched an ad for revival. I watched it through, I know I did because it counted toward the ad reward. But I didn't get revived and it sent me to the home screen. I love this game, honestly I play it all the time. This isn't the first time this has happened, but each time it does is more frustrating than the last.

Haven't been able to use it since the last update or so. Every time I try to open the app it immediately crashes. Have tried force stopping it, clearing cache and restarting my phone but nothing has worked so far. I don't want to uninstall and reinstall because I'm not sure if I'll lose all my items (I had the game years ago and recently reinstalled it, and the only thing I kept was my high score). Also, the update broke Facebook link, so I couldn't see my friends.

When I started playing, I got very disappointed The game is full of intrusive pop ups while you are playing.who thought that it would be a good idea to fill half of your screen with random pop ups? it's annoying and distracting. The only thing that tapping the pop up does is offering you a ad.When I finished my run the game offered me to watch an ad for more points, and I tapped no, then the game as a reward forced me to watch an ad. I just uninstalled. Annoying ads everywhere.

I had originally rated this game FOUR stars. I enjoyed it very much. Not anymore. I even considered deleting it. The last 2 updates were absolutely atrocious, and I MEAN that. The first was absolutely unethical and even malicious. We worked so hard only for it to all go in vain, as we're told few days later that we have to PAY for characters we were PROMISED would be FREE. I emailed the team. They responed nearly a week later that the next update would be better. Spoiler, it's literal trash!

Ads would not work when I am going to watch it. It says "no connection" well in fact, I have a high speed and stable internet connection. Fix your game it has been like this since the Lunar New Year update. It sucks to see that your game is not prioritizing the players because of your lack of will and determination. Still 1 star.

I just got a new phone then tried playing it after finishing up the tutorial I found out I couldn't log in to my previous achievement.. I've tried everything I could but it's just not going and I'm not about to start a new game totally so please see to it. So unfair the same thing is still happening after 4 years

I literally play this game everyday BUT SINCE A FEW DAYS IT'S BEEN LAGGING SO SO MUCH.. I've restarted my phone n this prob is not there in any any other games or apps.. I watch videos n it lags midway and I lose my reward.. everytime I try to watch videos to increase the collected things, it shows Internet prob when my WiFi is at 5 bars.. please fix ASAP

I love and hate this game. Game is amazing, but if you changing a device, you have to start anew. And it's really frustrating. I don't think I will play it again, J lost all my accumulated characters and board, so I am just disappointed.

even though i love this game very much. i have to say that I can't log into my account, and it's really devastating for me. it recognizes my account from Play Store when i go in the game, but i can't get it back from "play games - connect " i'd really appreciate you guys helping get my account back! edit: STILL NO HELP!!

it used to be an awesome game. this season just started and I was already done with stage 1 and halfway done with stage 2 to earn a skin. I woke up to find it all changed and now behind a pay wall. Its genuinely a scam when a season lasts less than a month. why does it cost more than entertainment monthly subscriptions (example: hulu+disney combined and paramount? it's ridiculous and outrageous. downright greedy.

I earlier rated it 5 stars, but I am editting it to bring up a major issue I am currently facing. I played this game 2 times a day and also crossed a peak score of 6 million. But, suddenly a day comes and I see that the game is refreshed to level 0, from the beginning. This has happened 5 times and the 5th time forced me to delete this game.......... I request that this issue should be taken seriously. I am never gonna install it again.

the gameplay loop is subpar after 10 years of the game being out, you have to pay to not get ads, the game basically forces you too buy all the new skins otherwise you have to run 13MILLION steps to get one new character obviously after you played their horribly thought out game modes I have much more to say about the game but it's not even worth it, the game sucks and there is not point in starting/coming back too it. 💪

I found Subway Surfers to be incredibly disappointing and, at times, almost atrocious in terms of overall quality. The gameplay is painfully repetitive and lacks any real depth or innovation. After just a few minutes, every run feels identical and mind-numbingly monotonous. There is no meaningful strategy or skill progression, only endless, mechanical swiping. The excessive advertisements and aggressive in-app purchases feel intrusive and greedy, completely ruining the experience.

As much as i love the game. But everytime i use the ads and this ad will just be completely not loading then followed by saying "Connection Error" when currently my wifi is running smoothly. Or you just have limited ads cause ain't no way it says "ad problem" just like that. Please you have so many ads but why always the same? It's annoying me so much. Fix it. One star.

I LOST ALL OF MY PROGRESS during the last update I had to reinstall the game and when I opened it , despite that I had it connected to both Facebook and Google Play and I still have everything of my achievements and records saved on both accounts, However when I reconnected the game nothing came back as it was and I contacted your support but didn't have my problems solved. More than 250 characters, 250 boards, 4400 hoverboards, 300000 coins and 2200 keys all gone in vain. Support please HELP.

Good game to run, jump and rock'n roll. Sadly hard earned collection of characters, boards, current week high score, upgrades etc. won't stay with you forever. Even online save didn't save mine from getting lost forever. Worst support won't care to respond if you don't spend money. And I contacted you guys support in help section and waited for 14 days+ and no response. And so I uninstalled it. If you want this to change, you start replying me here in Play Store and get my characters back.

Majority of season rewards that were already hard to get are now behind a paywall. Other collectibles cost a TON of in-game currency. You'll see items repeatedly circulating even though there's been hundreds of characters released. Good luck completing achievements and collecting characters and boards without spending YEARS playing, or plenty of money. Events are irrelevant and content isn't cohesive, especially when you compare core crew to new characters. Far removed from the original version.

star_2.text: I used to love this game. I hate the new update. The whole point of the game was to play each game, collect the tokens & buy new characters & surfboards. That's gone. logged on long enough to play No Floor Challenges, do the daily tasks & logged off. Now to get most of the new characters you have to buy the upgrade, each month. The 1 good thing about the update, I'm no longer watching a bunch of ads to get my tokens. I used to watch every one inside the run & the ad to double tokens.

This game is ok. I'm annoyed about some things though. My biggest complaint is that there are missions to complete and at times they can be frustrating ESPECIALLY the mission to find multiple keys in one run. Well this might sound easy, but when you can go an entire run and not see a key, that's not cool and I've been playing the game for years. Finding keys within the run rarely ever show up so it is time to retire this mission. Or, program the game to be a bit more frequent for keys to appear!

For all the ads and free to pay features and the fact it's 10 years old you'd think one thing you wouldn't have to worry about are bugs. Last night, I find myself on a pretty good streak. I've probably dumped more than 30min into the game and I'm nearing 7mil points and I hit an obstacle. No problem, I'll watch an ad. It loads and loads AND LOADS. Okay, forget it, I'll use a key. Nope. Game is stuck on getting me that ad. I have to force close. None of my progress is saved. I'm done

Overall, the game is pretty fun. I love how you can collect the coins and jump over things, also when you live for a long time, the speed gets harder and harder. But some problems and thing I hate about this game is, that you can get coins easily, but keys are hard to get. Same with the updates. There is this flower thing you have to collect, and it comes once every 10 min. Can you also please fix the characters, there really ugly.

Great game. Horrible glitch. Had a 6 mil run going, paused, left the app for maybe 5 minutes, come back, and I have no run left. Back at the home screen with no score, no daily run rewards, no mystery boxes to open, only coins and tokens saved. This is not the first time. I get 4 mil average score per run and when you play for that long you're bound to pause the game and do other things, so have some sort of pause safety for the og players.

The new update looks like the company hired a graphic designer that got their degree from MySpace. I opened the app and immediately thought, "oh jeez when did I download Chinese bootleg Subway Surfers?" They took a fun, simple UI and added too much saturation and contrast, then made the text smaller for some reason? I can almost hear Linkin Park playing in the background. But I guess it's good for the 2000's nostalgia if you like the graphics from the Sims 1.

why is it always a connection problem? I have the fastest internet provided to me. I looked at my internet, and I was connected. lost a lot of my characters, coins, keys, and whatever else I had. This is my 2nd time this has happened. Look at the last 10 games. I kept on trying to watch videos, but the commercial stopped after 3 seconds and then went back to game saying connection problem. I would like the email of the company please as well all my items, characters, and so on. Thank you.

Fun game. There is a problem with the inner workings of the game regarding connection. My data or wifi would be working fine, then the game would tell me that there's a problem with the connections and, inevitably, it happens when I'm going to watch an ad to double my prize when the reward is something good. I usually don't have network problems on my end. Please fix this.

The game is good, the graphics and controls are fine. I've been playing it off and on for probably 7 or 8 years, reinstalled today just for the fun of it, immediately disappointed after crashing watching an ad after getting a pretty high score on the burger king event only to find out, it didn't count. So I wasted time and effort. I mean come on seriously? Not to mention how sad it is to see this game become so greedy. My daughter loves this game but 10$ for a single character? Gtfoh.

Ad integration is great! Barely any ads and the ones that show up are easily skippable. But they chose to replace ads with their own prompts. Everytime you start the app you have to dismiss at least 3 prompts if their upsells. Even randomly in between you get bombarded with repeated prompts. At some point it feels worse than ads. It's always in your face and I just end up closing the game when that happens.

Honestly the gameplay is just amazing! I used to play this game in 2015 and it was a blast! But now i have installed it for the nostalgia and to see how the game was. But i was absolutely disappointed by the amount of ads. Like watching ads to claim rewards that i spent time unlocking by running. So now i not only have to play the game to unlock rewards, now i have to watch ads to claim them?! I know that they need to make money, but come on! I know you can do better.

Fun. Occasional bug but they're quick to fix them. Thing is it kept freezing so i did the uninstall reinstall trick. But all of a sudden the automatic save doesnt work. I lost all of my characters that i worked years to get. And now not only do i have to start from square 1. I also dont have the chance to get previous characters because they were special ones that only come when theres a special event. I love this game so much but that just killed my soul.

It's a ripoff sometimes Edit: it's just little things that really are frustrating, like when you get a jetpack, it stops in the middle and throws you back down, and when you watch ads, it sometimes doesn't give you what you watched the ad for, it occasionally glitches and when you try to swipe, it doesn't work. Just a ton of these little things that are super annoying to deal with all the time. This may be user error or a phone malfunction

I love the game, but since the update, the glitches are horrible! Even if you have a board and crash into the top of a tunnel, it'll end your run, power ups disappear right before you can touch them, you finish a mission, and it doesn't count it at the end of your run (just some things I've noticed so far). Please fix! It would be a shame to ruin a once great game!

after an update, if I connect through wifi and if I open the game it's not getting opened and more after connecting to wifi unable to play the game as well, it's getting lag like anything, kindly fix that bug, game wise it's very in interesting and fun. but to complete the mission without wifi connection it's very much difficult to play

Came back to this game after 9+ years and thought you know maybe it's changed and it has different features and it did, The thing is the game still feels good when it was first published. The problem is I updated the game since you know I haven't used it for awhile and thought you know I can't wait to see what's in the new update, Absolutely nothing because Everything I had was deleted the score, coins, keys, the characters..and then I say F it, it izz what it izz but noo it happens again😱😑.

I had to change my review from 4 stars to 2 after 5 years of enjoying subway surfers. Greed and laziness have honestly ruined the fun! there's way too many forced ads after every second run, ads that are 30sec doesn't have the X to exit the video after it's done it loads up the advertised game so you're stuck another 10 seconds.The updates maps have been recycled from years earlier. Come one SYBO you had a good thing going!

So I like the game itself but unfortunately lost all of my progress due to support not responding to me and ended up deleting all the data because I wasn't getting my rewards. Now I have to sit here and watch 4 diffrent ads per reward. It's the most annoying thing ever when you watch the same ones over, and over and over and over again.Most ads include two per watch. Another issue is that some of the ads have provided spam links to were it freezes and have to foreclose the app and start all over

the game is kinda bugged because sometimes it freezes I don't know if it's the game or it's my phone but also i have something to report and i don't think there is a button to report or something like that, and i wanted to report about a bug, you know on the timer event where you need to run as much as possible in 1min, so i was almost done, i was at the second to last but when i finished my party it said "event complete" without claiming Mia (green) i am really angry about this. GIVE ME MY SKIN

redownloaded the game, love it but the new update is TERRIBLE. New quests aren't helpful I had grinded so many tokens and points just for them to be replaced by some random questsvamd tickets? not cool subway surfers,also it's more complicated aswell honestly so much more of a hassle and annoyance preferred the last update. hate the new one please fix it or get it out the way it honestly wasn't a good idea, makes things more of a hassle it's not good.

star_3.text: Even though I'm tempted to reinstall this game every month when the location changes (the graphics are nice, so that's a plus), it's not for me anymore. The gameplay, which hasn't changed since I first played this in 2012 other than the ultra jump and getting powerups more often, gets predictable and repetitive, without a wide variety of obstacles. Getting the unlockables feels like a chore and the opposite of fun. Sorry devs, it would be dishonest of me to ignore that and give 5 stars for that.

Even though there is a save feature now, it's not the best. For instance, the save feature is only valid to the device for which you saved your progress on and NOT on any other device that you wanted to log in on. In my opinion, I feel like your save progress should be linked to your account and not the device or it could be both. Also, the game still lags at mid to no wifi at all so I'd like it if that got fixed.

Great game, pretty timeless and loads of fun. But there are a few problems I have with it. Firstly, I wish you could pause your runs and continue them later. Because a lot of my runs go into the multi-million score levels, and especially when I'm out and about, I have to cut them short by pausing, which is a problem because secondly, when the game is loaded out of memory for long enough the run just ends without any chance to continue. This can even happen after watching an ad which I hate.

I love the game, but can you limit some of the ads? There's always an advertisement the moment I open the app, the moment I die, to gain keys, hoverboards, and money. The ads that pop up when I open the app and close the app overwhelm me and make me want to delete the app because I already have the option to watch the ad for hard to get/expensive items.

This is a fun game that I really really enjoy. But multiple times, mainly when I've beaten a high score or event but am still running, the game will lag, freeze and close. And any progress I've made is gone. I've essentially lost so many keys, power ups and head starts because when I reopen the game I won't have the points I've earned but anything that I've used during the previous run will still be gone. It gets very frustrating.

I had to get a new phone, and am so upset that my Subway Surfers did nottransfer over. Lost all of my accomplishments, all of my characters, all outfits, all trophies, boards, keys , money, in app purchases, everything! It is like I'm starting all over. I really enjoy this game, unfortunately I probably won't play the game anymore. Would LOVE to get everything back.

Really fun, nice power ups, good challenge, overall fun. Also optional ads for exceptional rewards. However, there are so many non optional ads. Very intrusive. I already watch most of the ads it gives me the option to, but it has so many by default. I cannot go to the main menu after a run without an ad. Please make all ads optional. I will watch them, because I like the rewards. If you fix this, I will rate 5 stars.

The power-up boots are horrible. You can jump too far and lose, or you can jump off a train too high and bump into something and lose. I lost my one million+ streak because of this issue. I can fix my review when this issue is fixed. Other than the boots, this game is great. Entertaining for long periods of time. It's hard enough to keep you challenged and easy enough to keep you entertained. Plus in-game challenges. It's my favorite offline game. I just really wish they'd fix the boots.

Came back to the game after 5 yrs - As far as game play, I do enjoy it overall as it's a nice simple time killer. I have noticed, however, that the game has become way too crowded with too happening on the menu page and way too many ads. Also I'm not sure who the creators are but it seems like they just chose Black stereotypes to go with whether it's basketball player, jazz musician, or boom box carrier. Could've been way more creative like how the other characters are.

This is an excellent time-killer. However, it requires a lot of side-grinding. Infact, this season's character and board are to be acquired as rewards in Quests, which is notoriously hard (timed). As a student, I can't dedicate so much time to grind. I understand that it's no fun if things are too easy, but getting Season Specials should be much easier. Otherwise, it's definitely my go-to game. Warning: it's addictive! <3

It's a fun game but every time we either move to a new place or something it reboots and I loose all my characters and coin and keys as and it keeps happening! It's like I never even played which makes me not want to play because I will just be wasting my time trying to get it back and the just lose it all over again. Its getting annoying. I really do enjoy the game. Please fix.

I love all the characters in the game and how challenging it get thru out the run. It's very entertaining 😁 I just don't like how it can be slow sometimes. It sometimes doesn't let me watch the add to get my prise, even if I have full bars. And I have to get to x8 speed just to go to the next level on something...If this gets fixed,then it will probably be a 5.

This is a really fun game and I enjoy it but I had alot of characters and the game got deleted and i saved it all luckily. I downloaded it again and connected the saved account with all my keys and coins and it didn't give me anything which is really annoying since I had spent weeks grinding just for fun and it was all gone. All it gave me was 8 of the 20 keys I had. But still good game but need to find better ways to save data.

I have played this game for over a few years over many accounts. This game is one of my first picks if I'm bored during a class or in general. But my main problem has been things such as, when I start up the game, you are bombarded with as much as 5 microtransactions before you have even started playing. although the ads within the app are minimal, and appear only a few times as you close certain menus, it's very random when it decides if it appears. Otherwise it's good time passer.

It's decently fun, though it feels a lot like attrition is the best way to get high scores. In this, it reminds me a lot of Jetpack Joyride with a different perspective. Controls are responsive for an action game on a phone but dang if normal buttons wouldn't be better than swiping! The worst thing is all the basing nagging for money and ad watching. Also, you can't start with a girl character, which is annoying even though it doesn't affect gameplay.

It's a good classic mobile game. The gameplay is like usual, and it's buttery smooth. Unfortunately, the game is a bit riddled with ads. There is 50% chance you're going to get an advert after every game. Of course, if you don't select the "2x my reward by watching ads" offer when you lose. The UI is also cluttered with so many events and things going on. You have seasonal missions, battle pass, events, etc. UI looks like a mess on the lobby.

I have always enjoyed this game, and I'm happy that my characters were all saved after getting a new phone and having to reinstall. My only complaint is that the volume for the game is SUPER LOW, but then the ads are BLASTING! So I really hope this gets fixed. It's annoying that I have to keep adjusting my volume, and I have to have my volume all the way up to actually hear the music. But it's not my speaker that's the problem cause then the ads that play are so loud, you can hear a mile away.

Still a fun game, although minor hiccup. Purchased a coin pack during a run (have receipt, lost service and it didn't give me the coins or count towards removing ads. Also the game for whatever reason did not remember my purchase of double coins back when I played it before. Tried logging out and into my FB where it was linked before. All progress gone.

Great, for the most part. Downside, the "video button" is basically a decoration at this point. It lets me, repeat, LETS ME (as in not my choice just to be as explicit as possible about "lets me") watch ONE, not two or three or as many as I want, one. Uno. Eines. Oden. 1. video a day to get keys. Please fix this, there's a lot of video rewards getting missed because of this bug.

Mostly fun; however the integration of the ads gets glitchy from time to time, where you try to view an ad for a reward and it fails despite having a very solid Internet connection. And once that happens, the "try again" inevitably fails, repeatedly. Someone's it will eventually play an ad, and recognize it for "mystery box" count, but still fail to continue or give the reward. I suspect back end load of some sort, but who knows. No real weekend other than to give up and come back later.

star_4.text: Subway Surfers is a game that I have fond memories of from when I was young and even to this day it is a fun time-waster. However, I'm not sure if it's just my device or something that happened with the new updates, but I'm experiencing issues with my swipes not being recognized as often. Could be a device issue, but I have not had this problem in the past with Subway Surfers, just with this recent update. The occasional unpredictable lag has cost me several runs, including runs using boosts.

The game itself is addictive, fun, & super easy to get into. Maybe a little repetitive, tho. It can take a while to get all the characters, boards, & achievements, but it's worth the time investment. Some of them are paywalled, which can be annoying. The gameplay is fast-paced & addictive. My only complaint is the number of cheaters that pollute this game. Also, Sybo are very slow to fix game issues, which hinders progression. Aside from that, I'd 100% recommend. Great time waster for sure

ok, first off, I love this game. I love the style of it and all of the cool characters you can unlock during different events. and the events themselves are also just so cool, all the different locations the events are in is absolutely awesome. but im a little confused about how sometimes the ads will work after a run, but i cant see ads to get rewards or to continue a run. I've tried everything I could think of to fix it but it just doesn't work.

i absolutely love this game! It's so fun and very addictive! but my only issue is that it costs to get every good character. every single new character you have to buy! i want more characters we can buy with just a little bit of coins. the event that's happening now is really fun! It's just really hard since it takes 3-7 hours for me to play the event again. and i really want the characters! subway surfers please make new characters that you can buy with coins!

This is honestly a very well done game, I love the gameplay, and the art is nice and vibrant! The ads, while there are a lot of them, are fairly unobtrusive and the in-app purchases could definitely be worse. I do feel that the amount of events that this game goes through is a bit excessive, but that's more of a nitpick than a true complaint.

I feel like its the perfect offline game for car rides. Its not the type of game a play at home if thats what your looking for. The game is great, just I feel like the home screen is so confusing because of the amount of buttons. like, i feel there should be a bundles section in the store instead of on the home screen. I also feel like im struggling to keep up with the constant rotating of events too. Over all, great game. definitly would recommend as a good offline game.

The game is fun, there is always events going on, the skins are cool, and progression is very streamlined. The reason for 4 stars is the constant crashes I get during runs. 7M distance and going not once or twice but three times in one day, and no progress was saved. In an endless runner like this, a continue run would be nice if the game is closed during a run.

I love the game!!! Very addicting and requires focus and hand cordination. The only thing I will complain about is that I played a while ago and I got really good, and got a bunch of stuff, and then I deleted it to free up space. I just got back on almost a year later and it asked if I wanted to get my progress back. I did and it barley has any of my stuff, none of the characters (except for the main one) are unlocked and none of my progress is there. Other than that I suggest getting this game!

I love the game, however, I'm not a fan of how many items you need to unlock other surfers or their power ups etc. Ex. I need 250 alien ships to unlock that power up but they only come around once in a while. It's annoying. Overall, like the game and graphics. It'd be cool if we could pick what part of the world we wanted to run in just as we pick who to use as our runners.

It's a very fun game! It's okay and all but I could personally have some issues with the game. 1.when I have good internet and I want to watch an ad for mystery boxes it says "no connection" 2.the movements are too slow. I could try to roll but it would go too late And 3. The characters are way too expensive. For example I would have to pay 30k coins for one character although its just the same as all the others it jumps, rolls and, runs. There may be typos because this isn't my first language

I really love this game, its entertaining, is very inclusive for different areas, and has a multitude of characters with all sorts of backgrounds. However, while I do love the style in the game, a lot of the special characters are in bundle packs which you have to buy. For the Day of the Dead month, I really wanted a few of them, but they were only able to be bought with actual money, which is disappointing. While I understand buying keys, buying characters makes them unattainable to some.

The reason I am giving my (what used to be) favorite game that I've grown up with a 4 is because when I was playing for a few minutes then decided to take a break to grab something to eat. A few a hours later I come back and the 3 keys I got from watching an ad disappeared plus another that I got from a run. Seriously, I had 59 keys now I have 55. Who ever is reading my review is probably rolling their eyes but you probably wouldn't get it since I didn't cheat, in other words pay for the keys.

Great time killer, I love the daily challenges and all the different characters. Update: I stopped playing this game for several years and just picked it up again. It's still a fun game, however I had to remove a star. It had lost all my saved data and all the characters and hoverboards I bought years ago. Also now when I drop from the sky after earning a boost it keeps dropping me on barriers that kills me. I haven't found a way to avoid this and it keeps happening.

I recently reinstalled and I still like this game after however many years, but lately I've been noticing bugs specifically after being revived- There's one bug where sometimes after you watch a video, it stays on the revive menu and is just frozen with no sound, and I have to restart and lose my progress. I can still press the buttons, but they do nothing. There's another one where after being revived, I can't move my character and they just run in a straight line.

Its a really cool game good time killer, but its been acting really glitchy lately.   For example, if i try to jump from one train to the next train, it starts to act slow then I automatically see my character on the other side of the train mid-jump.  Though i tried to ignore it, it glitches every 1-2 seconds! Especially when i had to pass a train or do a quick turn and it glitches mid-way crashing me. Not even lasting 5 minutes in the game!!!  You guys seriously need to refresh the game or something to solve the problem.  But for those that do not know this game that much it's actually REALLY fun! The game right now is just having some technical difficulties. (which is RARE in their case.)   However the game itself: testing your eyes on how fast they could catch up with your character, getting boosters,and collecting coins to buy really cool stuff!  All while, not trying to get caught by a dog and a police officer, its kinda like "Temple Run" but with more varieties of characters, boosters and themes. And like I said before its a great time killer that older and even younger kids could enjoy.  Its just this glitch thing was just annoying but, what do I know? Maybe my phone's the problem?  Choose what you want to do with this message if you even read this far lol and sorry about the whole dialog of why I made them into paragraphs for an easier read hehehe

I finally got the latest update and I like except for how the characters move side to side. They kind of wobble after moving. The graphics are great. I don't like that if you hit the top of the entrance to a tunnel you get stopped now. You used to kind of pass through and keep going. It is also harder to find the board or character I want to use. Overall, it is still a great game!

The game is starting to act up. Every time my character speeds up the game starts skipping and then it pauses and skips again. Please fix it. When its fixed I will be satisfied. I am lowering the stars because its getting worse. The game continues to crash on me and my coins aren't be counted when that happen. I'm really starting to dislike this game.

The game itself is pretty fun and mostly a good time waster, but the ads are horrendous. Not the amount but the kind of ads being displayed. I finished one set of the super runner event and tried to see how far I could get. Of course I hit something and wanted to watch an ad to see if I could get farther. It took about a minute for the little "X" button to appear before I could go back, but it kicked me out of the whole game. I lost all the progress on the super runner and my new highscore.

Absolutely love this game. It's been a minute since I last had the game, & I decided to redownload for the sake of nostalgia. It's still a lot of fun to play! I love the different locations that you can travel to now, & the diverse cast of characters is amazing. The reason I gave it 4 stars instead of 5 was the fact that my ads don't load anymore, so I can't claim some of the event rewards or get double rewards, which is kinda frustrating. If you could fix the ad issue, that'd be amazing.

I have played this game for years it's one of my favorite games. It is fun and challenging but here lately there is a ton of ads. You cannot do anything or get anything without watching an ad. On top of that the rewards has gotten smaller and what tokens or keys you use to get stuff has went up. I probably won't stop playing any time soon i just wish they would think twice about some of the changes that has been made.

star_5.text: Re downloaded this game for the first time in like 10 years. Great to see all the elements still operate just the same, it hasn't been over complicated, and it's still just as fun! But I am a little bummed (tho not surprised) that all my previous data is gone. which is a bummer, cuz I'd had nearly everything unlocked that was available at the time.

W Game, I'm genuinely so unemployed for this. However, the only annoying part is if you accidentally click/trigger an ad, it sends you the playstore and ruins your run. This is super frustrating when you're 3.6m into an event run, and then it's all ruined. Maybe a way to save a run during ads would be helpful. Maybe just save runs in general because most people play as leisure.

Gosh! this game is awesome! I love it! theres hardly any ads and you can play as much as you want! I highly recommend! I've been racing to, I think thats a new feature because I've had this app before and it didn't have racing. anyways, my only complaint is, it CAN get a little boring once you get used to it. I suggest they make some cool path ways or maybe some turns. something to think about. but other then that the game is great! 😎

This game is wonderful. I can't tell you how much I play it (even though I suck at it). The running, rolling, jumping, characters, events, rewards, it's unique and it's AMAZING. I don't have a problem with anything. The ads are mostly optional and rarely forced. You can do 99% percent of the game without buying ANYHTING. It's sensational, I demand you play it.

I played "Subway Surfer" 10 years ago. It was fun then. It was more difficult to play at first. I was able to get about 6 characters. You have really updated the game quite a bit. I really like the changes. Some things i am getting used to. I have to figure out how to do some things. It is really a variation on a theme. I wish i was good enough to win the Top 2 characters. The Woman from African or Carribean decent and the Man from the Middle East. "Congratulations" on 10 years strong!!

This is literally the perfect mobile game. On about every level besides the ads. There's hardly any, but you should put shorter ones in there. Like, if i wanna keep running after i get hit, i don't wanna watch a 30+ second ad to do so. But, I love the music, the functionality, and the ability to play offline. So, thank you for making the perfect game, and please shorten the ads a little bit.

I love this game and all the different characters and boards you can get. I just wish that there weren't so many ads. They can get pretty annoying over time. I hope one day they can add animal-based characters, like maybe a girl that has different animal suits, like for example, a Golden Retriever/dog onesie or a cat onesie. I think that that would be really cute. Any other animal onesie would be great too! Making your own characters is another good idea. Overall, the game is great!

I love it! It's a great mobile game. But the characters cost so much! But there's so many new features it feels like every month. Anytime I'm bored, I'll just play this. It entertains me for a while. Or it does not save my progress. But this game is a little hard. I think they should fix these glitches, cause there OP. But I normally play normal, or a few glitches. But besides. This game is perfect to entertain you!

This game is great but I'm wondering why you renamed frizzy to Ella? Or was her name always ella. I don't know if it was always this or not.im curious Anyways I have no problems with this game but say you use a key to save a life so you can run more. Then there is a train on the side of you and in front of you. Like you can't move anywhere and is forced to run into the train. I mean sure you can just double tap to keep on running but it will be helpful if this sort of thing was fixed it a bit.

Me and my young Grand clildren (9 & 6) still love "SUBWAY SURFER" even after 2+ years ! It really is a lotta fun !Very good game ! Interesting, re-news often, works/operates well, fairly easy. My only complaint is that you cannot log on, play, continuously from one device to another. If you get a new device, you must start all over from the beginning.

A classic chasing game where you can choose from many different subway runners in a 3 lane subway track. There is a new season with new opportunities of collaborations and new skins to play with every month, and there are events to keep you busy, and leaderboards! It's also possible to play without WiFi! You can still enjoy playing it, just without the online leaderboards, and ads don't work. But overall it is almost fully operational without WiFi. I really like this game, and suggest it to you.

Love this game so much and I always have!! However something that I would love to see in the game is a sync music mode in the settings. When I play I am usually listening to music, so I think it would be a cool idea if the app was able to sync with music apps such as Spotify, Apple music, and YouTube music to play the game to the songs you listen to. For example, when a song is playing, all of the moves you make are on beat. You jump or duck when there is a beat drop or something. Ideas ig☺️

6 years later and still love this game! Its relaxing and simple enough to figure out but tough to master (running a really good run). I love the changing characters and sceneries. My only wish is a way to save a favorite world. I remember a haunted one I loved and was very sad when it updated. Maybe if we could have a top 3 favorites where we can choose to go back there for future games. Awesome game!

Great way to kill time. Detailed maps. Really fun. A couple of ads, but they aren't bad. Without wifi it is kinda laggy, but still fun. The worst aspect of the game is that it continuously askes for you to rate it (that is why I'm rating it), but other than that, the ads aren't bad and the game is fun. High prices for new characters too, but the game needs to make money, so it is fine. You can still play the same without new characters. Really great game.

This game has improved tremendously since the first time I played it(2016)! Many fun new challenges and good graphics! Keeps you entertained. Love it! I'm also wondering what the point of collecting sneaks after completing quests is if you can't even use the sneaks to buy anything. Also, I wish it was easier to get more keys instead of having to buy them with real money, wish there was an option to spend like 20000 surfer coins to get like 10 keys for example.

This is a great and classic game that I enjoy playing! The game is highly addictive and has many side missions and events you can play. You can unlock different characters and hoverboards to play with by spending coins, or you can choose to buy upgrades. The ads are mostly optional, and when they do come after the rounds, they are super short. I love this game a lot, and it deserves 5 stars! Keep up the great work!

So far I'm engaged. I'm definitely tempted to make in game purchases every time I have a long run. I can see "save me" keys could be used super fast, thus super appealing to buy. I enjoy the Christmas theme. If you want me playing all year, I need a variety of maps. I'm also a fan of building my own team in the games I play so the different characters that appear after a certain number attempts at the mystery box and total coins, is a good thing. Right now, my only gripe is thst the map is constantly changing on every run, so I'll never be able to pattern out each level. I assume that was the game maker's intent, but without the possibility of unlocking new levels, I loose the different environment incentive. So, for now I'll assume the point is to rack up coins in order to play with different characters and use different items.

I wish that when you got a new character they would do something different. It would make it way more enticing if each person did something a little differently ie like jump higher, run faster, kick, double coins, always be on a hover board, etc. It give no insentive to want to keep getting more characters. I love the game and it's addictive but this would be nice.

This game is actually pretty fun. I'm having no lag or glitches happening to me. Sure, the ads may be annoying, but maybe it could just keep the game free. The ads can also help you to revive after beating your high score, maybe even gaining some more keys/coins if you want. The ads that they force you to watch is usually skipable, 30 seconds, or playable. Overall, I highly recommend this game to anyone and everyone that is reading this review. Also really fun and simple game.

this is a great game, honestly. I love how you can get some bundles by watching ads, as a person who doesn't like in-app purchases. the graphics are great. the outfits and character ideas are unbelievable! I would definitely recommend this to anyone! also the hoverboard ideas. outstanding! this is a great way to pass time and I love it!
